name: Achilles
title: Hero of the Trojan War
rationale: Patch trajectory: stable; Last touch: nerf in SMITE 2 Open Beta 30; Kit 20/100 (burst/dps/utility blend), build fit 0/100; Suggested cores: Death Metal, Avatar's Parashu, Titan's Bane
build_notes: Physical damage god — itemize Strength / physical cores (kit label Strength). Prefer STR power, physical pen (Titan's), AS/crit as role fits. High CC kit — CDR and survival items valuable.

abilities.name: Achilles Basic Attack
abilities.description: Deal Physical Damage to an enemy in front of you
abilities.stats_text:
Damage Scaling: 100% Strength + 20% Intelligence + 100% Attack Damage
Range: 2.56 meters
Cone Angle: 120 degrees

abilities.name: Gift of the Gods
abilities.description: Choose to wear armor or forgo it. Wearing armor grants bonus Health and Protections, while forgoing it grants bonus Strength and Movement Speed
abilities.stats_text:
Health: 25 + 10 Per Level
Protections: 5 + 2 Per Level
Strength: 3 + 1.5 Per Level
Movement Speed: 1% + 0.25% Per Level

abilities.name: Shield of Achilles
abilities.description: Punch forward with your shield, dealing Physical Damage and Stunning enemies in a short cone. The force of the shield radiates further, dealing reduced damage

Damage Scaling: 80% Strength

abilities.name: Combustion
abilities.description: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack provides 1 stack of Combustion. Hitting an enemy god provides 2. abilities.name: The Astrolabe
abilities.description: You gain Energy in your Astrolabe when you take damage from enemy gods or deal damage with your Attacks or Abilities (minions grant reduced Energy). rationale: Patch trajectory: falling; Last touch: neutral in SMITE 2 Open Beta 33; Kit 70/100 (burst/dps/utility blend), build fit 100/100; Suggested cores: Dreamer's Idol, Obsidian Shard, Spear Of The Magus
core_items_json: ["Dreamer's Idol", "Obsidian Shard", "Spear Of The Magus", "Soul Gem", "Spear of Desolation"]
build_notes: Magical damage god — itemize Intelligence / magical cores (kit label Intelligence; basic-attack STR% does not mean physical items). Prefer INT power, magical pen (Obsidian / Spears), CDR. High CC kit — CDR and survival items valuable.

abilities.description: Fire a projectile that deals Magical Damage to the first enemy hit

title: Goddess of Rivers

build_notes: Magical damage god — itemize Intelligence / magical cores (kit label Intelligence; basic-attack STR% does not mean physical items). Prefer INT power, magical pen (Obsidian / Spears), CDR. High CC kit — CDR and survival items valuable.

abilities.name: Yemoja Basic Attack
abilities.description: Fire a projectile that deals Magical Damage to the first enemy hit
abilities.stats_text:
Damage Scaling: 100% Strength + 20% Intelligence + 100% Attack Damage
Range: 8.8 meters
Radius: 0.48 meters
Ally Radius: 0.8 meters

abilities.name: Omi
abilities.description:
Yemoja uses Omi to cast spells instead of Mana, and her non-ultimate abilities have no cooldown.
Yemoja's water based attacks and abilities can hit allies, providing them a Heal every 0.5 seconds.
Yemoja's Basic Attack healing only affects Gods and does not proc item effects.
abilities.stats_text:

Heal Scaling Per Tick: 0.2 Per Level
